docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY COELLO, KARLA AS TO DEFENDANT RIOS, MICAELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-09-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RIOS, MICAELA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-14-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. WITH THE ASSISTANCE OF ROBERT WOODS, WHO TRANSLATES, DEFENDANT ADVISED TO RETURN WITH A SPANISH INTERPRETER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-11-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. TOTAL OF PAYMENTS $450.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 2/14/12. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
